name: Support delivery delay policy example
answer:
Support sends a shipping status update within 24 hours of a reported delivery delay.
Support resolves delayed shipments within 48 hours.
Customers receive an automatic replacement for every delayed shipment.

sources.title: Support Delivery Delay Policy
sources.content:
Support sends a shipping status update within 24 hours of a reported delivery delay.
Support resolves delayed shipments within 72 hours.
